title: ‘Adventure Time: Side Quests’ Sets June Release Date (TV News Roundup)
description: Cartoon Network Studio’s “Adventure Time: Side Quests” will premiere on June 29, Disney+ and Hulu announced. The show will stream on the platforms.
body:
Cartoon Network Studio’s “Adventure Time: Side Quests” will premiere on June 29, Disney+ and Hulu announced. The show will stream on the platforms. 

	The new “Adventure Time” companion series will follow “young hero Finn and his magical dog best friend Jake as they embark on adventures across the fantastical land of Ooo — partying with cloud people and punching evil in the butt along the way,” per the official logline.  
	

	“Making ‘Side Quests’ felt like making the original ‘Adventure Time,’ which felt like hanging out with art school buddies making professional cartoons,” said Nate Cash, showrunner and executive producer, in a statement. “That sounds like a big sandwich of feelings, and it was! You’re going to love these NEW adventures with Finn & Jake!”


	Sasha Knight voices Finn the Human and John DiMaggio returns as the voice of Jake the Dog. Fan-favourite characters also include Ice King (Tom Kenny), Princess Bubblegum (Hynden Walch), Marceline (Olivia Olson), and BMO (Niki Yang).

	“Adventure Time: Side Quests” is executive produced by Nate Cash, with Darrick Bachman serving as story editor. Victor Courtright and Niki Yang direct, Nick Cross is the art director and Matthew Janszen is the composer. 
	
		PROGRAMMING	

	A summer slate of Peanuts programming is coming to Apple TV, the company announced Tuesday.  

	The new programming slate includes a second season of the musical “Camp Snoopy,” out on June 26, and a new special “Snoopy Presents: There’s No Place Like Home, Snoopy,” which will premiere on July 31. Peanuts classics from Mendelson/Melendez Productions including “This is America, Charlie Brown” and “The Charlie Brown and Snoopy Show” will debut on July 3 and July 10, respectively, for the first time ever. 
	

	Apple TV’s Peanuts series also include “Snoopy In Space,” “The Snoopy Show,” “Camp Snoopy,” “It’s the Small Things, Charlie Brown,” “Lucy’s School,” “To Mom (and Dad), With Love,” “One-of-a-Kind Marcie,” “Welcome Home, Franklin,” “For Auld Lang Syne” and “A Summer Musical,” among others.  

	Apple TV is the exclusive streaming home for all things Peanuts through an expanded partnership with WildBrain, Peanuts Worldwide and Lee Mendelson Film Productions until 2030. The platform has been home to the Peanuts classic library since 2020 and is currently in production with WildBrain and Peanuts on a brand-new animated feature film starring Snoopy, Charlie Brown and the Peanuts gang.
	
		TRAILERS 	

	Paramount+ has released the trailer and first-look images for “The Agency” Season 2. All ten episodes of the show will be available June 21 at 12:00 am PT or 3:00 am ET on the streaming platform. 

	Per the official logline, the spy thriller “follows Martian (Michael Fassbender), a CIA agent living undercover in his own life. Samia (Jodie Turner-Smith), his lover, is a political prisoner in Sudan, and he will do anything to try to save her, even past the point of treachery. The only way out is deeper in. A knife-edge Martian must walk if he is to save love, life and his mission.” 

	“The Agency” also stars Jeffrey Wright, Katherine Waterston and Richard Gere, as well as Harriet Sansom Harris, John Magaro, Saura Lightfoot-Leon, India Fowler, Andrew Brooke, Christian Ochoa Lavernia, Reza Brojerdi, Ambreen Razia and Alex Reznik. Dominic West and Hugh Bonneville guest star, and the recurring cast includes Medalion Rahimi, Tessa Ferrer, Clayne Crawford, Keanush Tafreshi and Raza Jaffrey.

	The second season of The Agency was produced in association with Paramount Television Studios and 101 Studios. Jez Butterworth and John-Henry Butterworth return as writers and executive producers. Executive producers also include David C. Glasser, Ron Burkle, David Hutkin and Bob Yari for 101 Studios; George Clooney and Grant Heslov for Smokehouse Pictures; Alex Berger for TOP – The Originals Productions; Ashley Stern and Pascal Breton for Federation Studios/Federation Entertainment of America; Fassbender, Joe Wright and Keith Cox.
	

	Watch the trailer below.

schema.headline: ‘Adventure Time: Side Quests’ Sets June Release Date (TV News Roundup)

title: ‘Modern Family’ Siblings Ariel Winter and Nolan Gould Are Now Roommates: ‘It’s Like Our Own Little Reboot’
description:
It’s a Dunphy family reunion.

	“Modern Family” stars Ariel Winter and Nolan Gould, who played Alex and Luke Dunphy on 11 seasons of the ABC sitcom,
body:
It’s a Dunphy family reunion.

	“Modern Family” stars Ariel Winter and Nolan Gould, who played Alex and Luke Dunphy on 11 seasons of the ABC sitcom, are now roommates in Los Angeles.

	“It’s funny because I spend more time out here [in L.A.] now and I rent a house with Nolan,” Winter told People magazine. She had previously been living in Nashville with her ex-boyfriend Luke Benward, according to the publication.


	“People ask me about a ‘Modern Family’ reboot, but Nolan and I are real roommates now,” she added. “So it’s like we’re having our own little ‘Modern Family’ reboot, but it’s just the two of us living together. So I see him every day.”
	

	Winter told People she and Gould have considered letting audiences into their current life. “I’m not gonna lie, when we sit there at night and we watch, like, ‘Temptation Island’ together, it’s pretty hilarious,” she said. “So we have thought about it. We’re just like, people would find this really funny.”



	

					Nolan Gould and Ariel Winter in “Modern Family”
									©ABC/Courtesy Everett Collection
	



	Winter, now 28, and Gould, 27, were 11 and 10 years old when they met on the first season of “Modern Family.” They played the younger two siblings of the central Dunphy family, which also included dad Phil (Ty Burrell), mom Claire (Julie Bowen) and older sis Haley (Sarah Hyland).

	Created by Christopher Lloyd and Steven Levitan, “Modern Family” was hugely successful and was, for much of its run, the most-watched comedy on ABC. The show won 22 Emmys and earned 85 nominations.

	There has yet to be a spinoff or reboot of “Modern Family” — only various commercials in which some of the cast members reprised their roles from the sitcom. Jesse Tyler Ferguson has said the producers were “brewing this idea” of a spinoff centered on him and Eric Stonestreet, but he wanted to pursue other projects and “it ended up not working out.”

schema.headline: ‘Modern Family’ Siblings Ariel Winter and Nolan Gould Are Now Roommates: ‘It’s Like Our Own Little Reboot’

title: Disney Pulls Hulu Even Tighter Into Disney+ but Company Says ‘No Current Plans’ to Phase Out Hulu App
description: Disney continues to add more features hitching Hulu and Disney+ together as it takes steps toward the goal of “fully integrating” Hulu into the Disn
body:
Disney continues to add more features hitching Hulu and Disney+ together as it takes steps toward the goal of “fully integrating” Hulu into the Disney+ service.

	The Mouse House has outlined plans to deliver a “unified” app experience for bundle subscribers of Disney+ and Hulu in 2026, and the company is moving toward a future where both will be merged onto the same back-end tech platform. However, for now, the Hulu stand-alone subscription in the U.S. will remain available and “there are no current plans to sunset the Hulu app,” a Disney rep said.
	

	Starting Tuesday (May 19), customers with the Disney+ and Hulu bundle will be able to sync their profiles — including watch history, watchlist and recommendations — from Hulu with the Disney+ app. Once Hulu profiles are linked to Disney+, viewers will be able to pick up where they left off and stream content from both services from the Disney+ app.


	In addition, eligible Hulu-only subscribers will now be able to sign into Disney+ using their Hulu login credentials — where they will be able to stream Hulu content along with a “small sampling” of Disney+ and ESPN content, on Disney+ “to get a taste of what is offered to bundle subscribers,” the company said. In other words: Disney wants to entice them to level-up and purchase the two-service bundle.

	The latest integrated features build on Disney’s previous steps to integrate Hulu and Disney+. In the spring of 2024, the Disney+ app added the full complement of Hulu on-demand content (while Hulu + Live TV still remains separate).

	According to Disney, users will need to link their Hulu profile to Disney+ only once. After that, your watch history and recommendations will be reflected directly in the Disney+ app. Titles watched on Hulu will appear in the “Continue Watching” section of Disney+, and titles saved to “My Stuff” on Hulu will appear on Disney+ in the “Watchlist” section.
	

	Users with linked profiles will see their personalized watch history and recommendations, which include Hulu content, in the “For You” tab on the Disney+ home screen. Additionally, Hulu has its own dedicated Hub on Disney+.

	Additional Hulu features, such as live TV channels and access to add-on programming packages, are still available in the Hulu app and will be coming to Disney+ at a future date. 

	According to the company, Disney+ will soon begin testing a new “live guide” for subscribers to find content that’s livestreaming at the moment. This includes streams for ABC News Live and Disney+ Playtime for all Disney+ users and ESPN networks for ESPN Unlimited subscribers.

schema.headline: Disney Pulls Hulu Even Tighter Into Disney+ but Company Says ‘No Current Plans’ to Phase Out Hulu App

title: ‘Survivor’ to Receive Legacy Award at Newport Beach TV Fest, Season 50 Cast to Appear
description: CBS’ long-running competition show “Survivor” will be honored with the Legacy Award at the Newport Beach TV Fest on June 6. The award is in celebrat
body:
CBS’ long-running competition show “Survivor” will be honored with the Legacy Award at the Newport Beach TV Fest on June 6. The award is in celebration of “Survivor” completing 50 seasons, recognizing the show’s cultural impact and lasting influence.Fan-favorite players and “Survivor 50” cast members Aubry Bracco, Dee Vallardes, Ozzy Lusth, Rick Devens, Rizo Velovic and Tiffany Ervin will attend. There will also be a special video message from host and executive producer, Jeff Probst.“For 50 seasons, ‘Survivor’ has remained one of the most influential and enduring series in television history, continually redefining the reality competition genre while captivating audiences across generations,” says Gregg Schwenk, CEO and executive director of the Newport Beach TV Fest. “From Jeff Probst’s iconic hosting to the unforgettable players and moments that have become part of pop culture, ‘Survivor’ has built an extraordinary legacy of storytelling, strategy, and human connection. We are honored to present the series with the Legacy Award and thrilled to welcome members of the ‘Survivor’ community to Newport Beach for this special celebration.”Season 50 marked the first time in the series franchise where the fate of the game was in the hands of the viewers. Twenty-four previous contestants returned to face challenges and tribal council eliminations for a chance to win $1 million.Held at the Lido Theater, the Newport Beach TV Fest will run June 4-7 and host a lineup of screenings and events that highlight the full spectrum of television talent, from creators to industry leaders.


	“Survivor” joins previously announced honorees Andy Cohen (Variety Creative Impact Award), Mindy Kaling (Artist of Distinction Award), Sebastian Maniscalco (Standup Comedy Special of the Year), and Seth MacFarlane (Maverick Award), joined by the cast of “Landman”(Outstanding Drama Ensemble Award), the cast of “Shrinking” (Outstanding Comedy Ensemble Award), and Gold Derby’s Breakout Award honorees.

schema.headline: ‘Survivor’ to Receive Legacy Award at Newport Beach TV Fest, Season 50 Cast to Appear

title: ‘The Vampire Lestat’ Sets After-Show at AMC+
description:
AMC is launching a new after-show for “The Vampire Lestat,” the third season of “Interview With the Vampire.” 

	Titled “The Vampire Lestat: After D
body:
AMC is launching a new after-show for “The Vampire Lestat,” the third season of “Interview With the Vampire.” 

	Titled “The Vampire Lestat: After Dark,” the half-hour show will be hosted by Lizzie Bassett and will feature interviews with the show’s cast and creators. Among those set to appear are stars Sam Reid, Jacob Anderson, Assad Zaman, Eric Bogosian, and Delainey Hayles, as well as executive producer Mark Johnson and executive producer and showrunner Rolin Jones. 
	

	The after-show will launch with a special preview episode on May 24 on AMC+ before the series launch on June 7. Episodes will then air weekly on AMC+ and be available on podcast platforms the following day. Select episodes will also air on AMC, including the special preview episode on May 31, the season premiere on June 7 and season finale on July 19.


	The preview episode will see Reid, Anderson, Zaman, Hayles, Bogosian, Jones and Johnson tease the new season, including behind-the-scenes insights from the set. 

	“We’re thrilled to introduce this must-watch companion show for ‘The Vampire Lestat,’ a series that has truly captivated a loyal and passionate fan base,” said Ben Davis, executive vice president of scripted programming for AMC Global Media. “’After Dark’ is designed to enrich the viewing experience, with a deep dive into the lore of the show and behind-the-scenes insights from the cast and producers that pull back the curtain on the stories, characters and moments that define this upcoming season.”

	“The Vampire Lestat: After Dark” is produced by School of Humans and AMC Studios. Executive producers include guests Jones, Johnson, Reid, Anderson, Hayles, as well as LC Crowley, Brandon Barr, Ben Franzen, Adam O’Byrne and series showrunner Joe Randazzo.
	

	AMC was an early pioneer of the after show format with the launch of the incredibly popular and successful “Talking Dead” hosted by Chris Hardwick, which took fans behind the scenes of “The Walking Dead” franchise. That show aired for 11 seasons between 2011 and 2022.

schema.headline: ‘The Vampire Lestat’ Sets After-Show at AMC+

title: ‘Broken Sword’ Movie in the Works From Live-Action ‘Beauty and the Beast’ Screenwriter, Story Kitchen (EXCLUSIVE)
description: A film adaptation of mystery-adventure video game franchise “Broken Sword” is being developed by game maker Revolution Software, producer Story Kitc
body:
A film adaptation of mystery-adventure video game franchise “Broken Sword” is being developed by game maker Revolution Software, producer Story Kitchen and Disney’s live-action “Beauty and the Beast” screenwriter Evan Spiliotopoulos.

	Created by Charles Cecil, the “Broken Sword” series debuted in 1996 with “The Shadow of the Templars.” The franchise follows intrepid American George Stobbart and fearless French journalist Nicole Collard as they navigate ecclesiastical conspiracy throughout iconic European settings.
	

	Across five titles released over the past 30 years, the “Broken Sword” games have been played by more than 10 million players and is credited as a foundational title for modern-day narrative-driven gaming. Recently, Cecil’s Revolution Software concluded a successful Kickstarter campaign for the latest “Broken Sword” remake project, “Smoking Mirror Reforged,” which raised nearly $1 million against a $68,000 goal.


	The “Broken Sword” movie will be written by Spiliotopoulos, whose other writing credits include “The Unholy,” “Pirates of the Caribbean: Dead Men Tell No Tales,” and “G.I. Joe” movie “Snake Eyes.” 

	Story Kitchen, which is working on several high-profile TV and film adaptations of video games, including the new “Sonic the Hedgehog” film franchise and Amazon’s upcoming “Life Is Strange” series, will produce the film alongside Revolution’s Cecil and his partner, Noirin Carmody.

	“Very few franchises of this era have stayed relevant, premium, and loyal to the intelligence of their audience. ‘Broken Sword’ has done all three,” Story Kitchen co-founders Dmitri M. Johnson and Michael Lawrence Goldberg said in a joint statement Tuesday. “Our work here isn’t to adapt a game into a film. It’s to move a world that has been building for three decades into the next medium it deserves, working hand-in-hand with the people who built it.”
	

	“Story Kitchen came to this project with a deep passion for the IP,” Revolution Software founder and CEO Charles Cecil added. “That’s rare. The creative conversations have been about translating what ‘Broken Sword’ is, rather than what it can be made to look like. I am hugely excited to be working with Story Kitchen and Evan.”

schema.headline: ‘Broken Sword’ Movie in the Works From Live-Action ‘Beauty and the Beast’ Screenwriter, Story Kitchen (EXCLUSIVE)

title: Paralympics Star Ali Truwit Documentary ‘Stronger Than You Think’ Distribution Rights Acquired by Sox Entertainment
description: Distribution rights to the inspirational sports documentary “Stronger Than You Think,” which tells the story of Paralympic star swimmer Ali Truwit,
body:
Distribution rights to the inspirational sports documentary “Stronger Than You Think,” which tells the story of Paralympic star swimmer Ali Truwit, have been acquired by Sox Entertainment.

	Truwit made international headlines at the 2024 Paralympic Games in Paris when she competed (and won two silver medals) as a swimmer barely a year after losing her lower-left leg in a shark attack while swimming in Turks and Caicos in May 2023. The Connecticut native had just graduated from Yale University two days before with dual major in cognitive science and behavioral economics. She was already an accomplished swimmer who competed for Yale.
	

	Truwit, 26, has since become a magnet for brands and sponsors. She launched the nonprofit Stronger Than You Think to support her mission to using her story of rebounding after a tragic setback as an example to other women and girls. The “Stronger Than You Think” documentary was directed by Emmy winners Janice C. Molinari and Melissa Forman. It is produced by Allez! Sports, with Forman alongside Allyson J. Davis.


	“This film is for everyone out there fighting for their own comebacks, for everyone out there trying to turn hardship into hope, and for everyone out there working to make a difference in this world. I hope all who watch it walk away with what I know to be true: that we are all stronger than we think,” Truwit said.

	Truwit has struck sponsorship pacts with such blue-chip brands as Nike, and is on the corporate speaking tour for such heavyweights as Amazon, Merck and Bank of America. Last fall, Truwit competed in the New York City marathon using her prosthetic running blade. She has also been featured as a Sports Illustrated swimsuit model for the past two years. She has a book due out from St. Martin’s Press in 2028. And Truwit is widely expected to be a force at the 2028 Paralympic Games in Los Angeles. She has also worked as a business analyst for McKinsey & Co.
	

	Sox Entertainment, headed by CBS and Paramount veteran Scott Koondel, plans to shop “Stronger Than You Think” to a wide range of potential partners. 

	For now, the film is on a run through the summer and fall festival circuit. To date, “Stronger” has won the Audience Award at the Austin Film Festival, Best Documentary at Beaufort International Film Festival and Best Feature Documentary at the Garden State Film Festival. It’s set to play festivals in Nashville, Newport Beach, Sedona and Beverly Hills as well as the Chicago Women Fest, the Big Apple Film Festival and the Sports International Film Festival.

	“I’m privileged and thrilled to bring this riveting documentary to the marketplace. Ali’s resilient determination to overcome such adversity will inspire and entertain all audiences on all media platforms,” Koondel said.

schema.headline: Paralympics Star Ali Truwit Documentary ‘Stronger Than You Think’ Distribution Rights Acquired by Sox Entertainment

title: ‘Power Book III: Raising Kanan’ Trailer: Patina Miller Returns as Raquel ‘Raq’ Thomas for Fifth and Final Season
description: Starz has released the trailer and key art for the fifth season of “Power Book III: Raising Kanan.” Season 5 will premiere on June 12,  with new epi
body:
Starz has released the trailer and key art for the fifth season of “Power Book III: Raising Kanan.” Season 5 will premiere on June 12,  with new episodes streaming weekly on Fridays on the Starz app, and all Starz streaming and on-demand platforms.

	The trailer confirms Patina Miller will return as Kanan Stark’s (Mekai Curtis) mother, Raquel Thomas in the prequel “Power” universe series that follows Kanan Stark’s entry into the drug business. 
	

	“Now, in Season Five, Kanan’s true ruthlessness takes shape. He knows exactly who he is and who he must become to defeat his enemies,” per the official logline. “As his relationship with Raq reaches a point of no return, and any chance of reconciliation becomes a distant memory, war is inevitable. Kanan solidifies his place in the Queens drug game alongside Breeze, the Southside legend, and their alliance sets the stage for a reckoning that will ripple through every player in this dangerous business. Many sacrifices will be made, whether it’s the Thomas family facing the collapse of their reign, Unique fighting to preserve his legacy or the Mafia maneuvering behind the scenes. However, nothing will stand in the way of Kanan’s pursuit of power. After all, this isn’t the end for Kanan Stark. It’s just the beginning.” 


	“Power Book III: Raising Kanan” also stars London Brown as Marvin Thomas, Malcolm Mays as Lou Thomas, Joey Bada$$ as Unique, Hailey Kilgore as Laverne “Jukebox” Thomas, Wendell Pierce as Ishmael “Snaps” Henry, Erika Woods as Stephanie “Pop” Henry, Tony Danza as Stefano Marchetti, Joe Pantolliano as Pino Bernardi and Leslie Grossman as Florence “Flossie” Sigel.
	

	Creator Sascha Penn serves as showrunner and executive producer for the fifth season of the show. The “Power” Universe series is executive-produced by the creator and showrunner of the original “Power,” Courtney A. Kemp, through her production company, End of Episode; Curtis “50 Cent” Jackson, through G-Unit Film and Television; and Mark Canton, through Canton Entertainment. Chris Selak also serves as an executive producer. Lionsgate Television produces the series for Starz.

	“Power: Origins,” a “Power” prequel series that will pick up after the events of the “Power Book III: Raising Kanan” finale, is currently in production.

	Watch the trailer and see the fist look images below.




	

									Matt Infante
	





	

									Cara Howe

schema.headline: ‘Power Book III: Raising Kanan’ Trailer: Patina Miller Returns as Raquel ‘Raq’ Thomas for Fifth and Final Season

title: Billy Joel Biopic ‘Billy and Me’ in the Works From Director John Ottman (EXCLUSIVE)
description: Editor and director John Ottman is set to direct “Billy & Me”, a feature film chronicling the formative years of superstar singer-pianist Billy Joel
body:
Editor and director John Ottman is set to direct “Billy & Me”, a feature film chronicling the formative years of superstar singer-pianist Billy Joel.

	“Billy & Me” tells the origin story of Joel before fame, before the hits — and, significantly, before “Piano Man,” the 1973 song and album that lofted him to stardom. The film is told through the eyes of Joel’s first manager, Irwin Mazur, who discovered the singer in 1966, signed him in 1970 and oversaw his career up to his breakthrough deal with Columbia Records in 1972.
	

	Casting is currently underway, with production slated for this fall in Winnipeg, Canada and New York. The film follows the two-part 2025 HBO documentary on the singer, “And So It Goes.”


	The production has secured Mazur’s exclusive life rights, as well as those of Joel’s longtime friend, drummer and video director Jon Small, who is also on board as a consultant, co-executive producer and second unit director. Small was Joel’s drummer in their early band the Hassles, as well as Attila, a little-known acid-rock duo comprised of him and Joel that released an album in 1970. That album is deeply incongruous with the singer’s other work — Joel has described it in no uncertain terms as “psychedelic bullshit.” 

	It is also unclear how or whether Elizabeth Weber, Joel’s first wife and the subject of “She’s Always a Woman,” “Just the Way You Are” and many of his other hits, and will be portrayed in the film. She was married to Small and left him for Joel, leading to the breakup of Attila, before the couple themselves split up, factors that contributed to the singer spiraling into a deep depression and suicide attempts, as he discussed in “And So It Goes.” Small found Joel and rushed him to the hospital after the second attempt, and the two reconciled, as did Joel and Weber, who later became his manager.
	

	A rep for Joel, who apparently has not authorized the biopic, did not immediately respond to Variety‘s request for comment. 

	Most recently, Ottman served as lead editor on the “Michael” biopic and oversaw all creative aspects of post production, including shaping performances, directing ADR, and supervising the final mix. Filmmaker Adam Ripp is set to write the script and will produce the film under his ArtPhyl Pictures banner.

	Small says, “This is the most honest, heartfelt, and authentic portrayal of Billy’s early life and rise to becoming one of the greatest musical voices of our time. ‘Billy & Me’ is grounded in truth, shaped with care, and built with the insight of people who genuinely know and love Billy. As someone who was there from the very beginning, I can say this script captures not just the music, but the friendships, struggles, humor, and creative spark that defined those years.”

	He continues, “Too often, stories about artists get lost in exaggeration or mythmaking. ‘Billy & Me’ reflects the real history with integrity and respect. I first met Billy when he was 16 years old, and after reading the script, I felt the filmmakers truly understood who he was before the world knew his name.”

	Ottman says, “I’m really proud of the development work Adam Ripp and I did to shape ‘Billy & Me’ into both a deeply emotional and fun story. This is the formative years of Billy and his relationship with Irwin Mazur, the man who recognized Billy’s amazing talent even before Billy did himself. Sure, the long hair, cigarette smoke and authentic look of the period turns me on as a film-maker, but what truly drew me to the material was the humanity at its core.” Ottman added, “It’s funny, heartbreaking, and ultimately very inspiring.”

	Financing is being assembled by Jay Cohen, former Partner and Head of Film Finance and Distribution at the Gersh Agency, who is also representing domestic distribution. The film’s executive music producer is Grammy Award nominated music executive Mitchell Leib, who spent nearly three decades as President of Music and Soundtracks at The Walt Disney Studios.

	Ottman is represented by David Gersh and Abram Nalibotsky at the Gersh Agency. Ripp is represented by Trevor Engelson at Underground.
	

	Additional reporting by Jem Aswad.

schema.headline: Billy Joel Biopic ‘Billy and Me’ in the Works From Director John Ottman (EXCLUSIVE)

title: ‘Minotaur,’ Scathing Look at Corruption and Infidelity in Putin’s Russia, Electrifies Cannes With 8-Minute Standing Ovation
description: “Minotaur,” a pitch-black look at corruption in Putin era Russia, was greeted with a thunderous, eight-minute standing ovation at the Cannes Film Fe
body:
“Minotaur,” a pitch-black look at corruption in Putin era Russia, was greeted with a thunderous, eight-minute standing ovation at the Cannes Film Festival on Tuesday. 

	The film marks the return to the Croisette of Andrey Zvyagintsev, the Oscar-nominated auteur, whose previous films, “The Banishment,” “Leviathan” and “Loveless” also bowed at Cannes. Zvyagintsev, his eyes misting as the applause in the Lumière Theatre kept building, was flanked by the film’s stars Dmitriy Mazurov and Iris Lebedeva, who play a couple whose marriage is rocked by infidelity and deception. They were also joined in the auditorium by Boris Kudrin, who plays their teenage son Seryozha — at one point Mazurov tousled Kudrin’s hair.
	

	“I’m grateful to all of you, the audience here at the Lumière theater, for welcoming us so warmly and for giving us the opportunity to make this film and share it with you,” Zvyagintsev told the crowd. 


	“Minotaur” follows  Gleb (Mazurov) a prosperous businessman as he tries to keep his company running smoothly while the authorities keep pressuring him to provide lists of employees they can draft to feed the frontlines of Russia’s war with Ukraine. At the same time, Galina (Lebedeva) has embarked on a torrid affair that threatens to destroy the life that Gleb has built. The film was inspired by Claude Chabrol’s “La femme infidèle,” which also served as the basis of Adrian Lyne’s “Unfaithful.” Because of its scathing look at Putin-ism, “Minotaur” was shot in Latvia, which doubles for Russia. 

	“Minotaur” marks Zvyagintsev’s return to filmmaking after nearly a decade, a period in which he almost died. 
	

	“I spent almost one year in a clinic in Germany, where after spending 40 days [in a medically induced] coma I was not able to stand up,” he told Variety. “When I left the clinic, I moved to France and I decided to stay in France. And more and more, I’m convinced that I should stay here. I have no desire and no interest and no intention to live in a country that’s at war with its neighbors.”

	Based on the reception at Cannes, “Minotaur” seems like a strong contender for the Palme d’Or, alongside the likes of Paweł Pawlikowski’s “Fatherland,” Cristian Mungiu’s “Fjord,” and Ryusuke Hamaguchi’s “All of a Sudden.”

schema.headline: ‘Minotaur,’ Scathing Look at Corruption and Infidelity in Putin’s Russia, Electrifies Cannes With 8-Minute Standing Ovation

title: TMZ Streaming Live, Come Into Our Newsroom and Watch Things Happen!
description:
TMZ Live Stream
                          Come Into Our Office and Watch News Happen!!!
body:
TMZ Live Stream
                          Come Into Our Office and Watch News Happen!!!

                              May 19, 2026
                            10:32 AM PDT
                                                                            
      
    
                  
          
                          
                
                                  
      
    
          We want you to be a part of TMZ, so every weekday, between 10:30 AM and 12:00 PM PT, we take you inside our newsroom via live stream.
      
    
          You never know what you're gonna get ... a big story that breaks, an argument erupts in the room, or someone's just joking around.
      
    
          Your comments are a big part of the stream, and the staff spends a lot of time speaking directly to you. Every day is different!
      
    
          We also use our live stream to produce our "TMZ Live" TV show.

title: Lindsey Pelas Hot Shots To Kick Off Her 35th Birthday!
description:
Lindsey Pelas Hot Shots
                          To Kick Off Her 35th Birthday!
body:
Lindsey Pelas Hot Shots
                          To Kick Off Her 35th Birthday!
                      
                  
                                                                        Published 
                              May 19, 2026
                            12:45 AM PDT
                                                                      |
                                                                Updated 
                                  May 19, 2026
                                7:24 AM PDT
                                    
      
    
      
        
              
    
    
          Didn't ya hear?! Lindsey Pelas turns 35 today and it's only appropriate to gather all the best shots of this baddie!
      
    
          The actress and model has been turning heads on social media as she bares it all, leaving little to the imagination to her nearly 8 million Instagram followers🔥
      
    
                  
          
                          
                
                                  
      
    
          Don't hesitate to scroll through the gallery to see all her hottest pics!
      
    
          Happy Birthday, Lindsey!

title: Lil Poppa Tragic Death Detailed in Coroner's Report
description:
Lil Poppa
                          Coroner's Report Offers Tragic Details Of Death
body:
Lil Poppa
                          Coroner's Report Offers Tragic Details Of Death
                      
                  
                                                                        Published 
                              May 19, 2026
                            6:38 AM PDT
                                                                      |
                                                                Updated 
                                  May 19, 2026
                                10:56 AM PDT
                                    
      
    
                  
          
                          
                
                  
      
    
          Lil Poppa -- a popular rapper based out of Jacksonville, Florida -- died in February ... and now his official cause of death has been released.
      
    
          According to documents from the Fulton County coroner, obtained by TMZ ... the rapper -- real name Janarious Mykel Wheeler -- died from a single self-inflicted gunshot wound to the left side of his head. He was in the passenger's seat. A toxicology report is pending.
      
    
                  
          
                          
                
                  
      
    
          Hapeville Chief of Police Bruce Hedley previously told TMZ ... Lil Poppa was in a single-car accident on Interstate 85 south of Hapeville, Georgia ... shortly after his manager came to meet him ... and that is when he shot himself.
      

          Lil Poppa was signed to Yo Gotti’s Collective Music Group (CMG) and has released several hit tracks over the last few years, including "Love & War," "Mind Over Matter," and "HAPPY TEARS."
      
    
                  
          
                          
                
                  
      
    
          Poppa's 16-song album "Almost Normal Again" came out in August ... and, he released a new single titled "Out of Town Bae" earlier this year.
      
    
          He was 25.
      
    
          If you or someone you know is struggling or in crisis, help is available. Call or text 988 or chat 988lifeline.org.

title: Snooki Claims Wendy Williams Tried to Expose Her Secret Pregnancy On-Air
description:
Snooki
                          Wendy Williams Tested My Pregnancy ...
body:
Snooki
                          Wendy Williams Tested My Pregnancy ...
                          Gave Me Alcohol On-Air
                      
                  
                                                                        Published 
                              May 19, 2026
                            8:53 AM PDT
                                                                            
      
    
        
                    
                  
      
    
          Snooki says Wendy Williams tried to manipulate her into revealing she was pregnant while live on-air ... using alcohol as a makeshift pregnancy test.
      
    
          The "Jersey Shore" star discussed the moment on an episode of Kaitlyn Bristowe's 'Off the Vine' podcast ... explaining she hadn't told the world she was pregnant at the time, but rumors had started to circulate.
      
    
          Williams heard these rumors, Snooki says ... and gave her a bottle of beer on her show -- basically saying, "Let's see if you're pregnant."
      

          Snooki says she put the bottle to her lips but didn't sip it ... a shrewd move that kept her secret intact.
      
    
          Snooki guested on "The Wendy Williams Show" during its run multiple times ... delivering a ton of memorable moments like revealing she and her husband conceived their daughter while he was driving a car.
      
    
          Williams is no longer on TV -- the show ended in 2022 -- and now has much more pressing concerns than Snooki's pregnancy ... namely, trying to free herself from a conservatorship our own Harvey Levin has said he doesn't think is necessary.
      
    
          Unclear if Wendy would come back to TV if released from the guardianship ... but, it sounds like Snooki wouldn't be rushing to sit down with her again.

title: Diana Ross Goes Undercover for Grocery Run in Los Angeles
description:
Diana Ross
                          I'm Coming Out ...
                          With Bags of Gr
body:
Diana Ross
                          I'm Coming Out ...
                          With Bags of Groceries
                      
                  
                                                                        Published 
                              May 19, 2026
                            9:21 AM PDT
                                                                            
      
    
        
                    
                  
      
    
          Diana Ross traded center stage for the checkout line ... because the music icon was spotted keeping things super low-key during a grocery run in Los Angeles.
      
    
          Check out the video ... Diana kept a mask on and dressed almost entirely in black while loading up groceries outside a Bristol Farms store, but there's only so much undercover you can be when you’re one of the most recognizable music legends on the planet.
      
    
          The legendary singer and actress appeared focused on the task at hand -- loading a pair of bags, pushing her cart to her car and running errands without much fanfare ... a far cry from the glamorous concert stages she's known for.
      

          Still, even a simple grocery run looked a little more glamorous with Diana ... because let's be real, when she is bagging groceries, it somehow looks more iconic than the rest of us fumbling with bags in the self-checkout lane.
      
    
          And judging by the size of the small haul, one thing's for sure: "Ain't No Mountain High Enough" ... for these grocery prices!
